name: @terminull/desktop
//: M10 Electron thin shell. HARD RULES (contract): ZERO native modules; thin client only (all state lives in the panel server); single instance via app.requestSingleInstanceLock + the server.json discovery file; NO remote content loading — the window loads the LOCAL web bundle only and talks to http://127.0.0.1:<port> from server.json. electron is a devDependency (contract-listed exception); packaging/signing is DEFERRED (v0.x ships as a documented unsigned local build — no electron-builder).
